# ADClientError

**Structure**

The group of error codes that pass from the attribution response to the completion handler block.

## Declaration

```swift
struct ADClientError
```

## Overview

When you call the [doc://com.apple.iad/documentation/iAd/ADClient/requestAttributionDetails(_:)] method, error codes are passed from the attribution response to the completion handler block.

## Error Codes

- **corruptResponse**: The response received from the attribution server was corrupt.
- **requestClientError**: The response received from the attribution server had an HTTP 4xx status code.
- **requestNetworkError**: The communication with the attribution server had a network error.
- **requestServerError**: The response received from the attribution server had an HTTP 5xx status code.
- **trackingRestrictedOrDenied**: The user is restricted or has denied tracking for the calling application.
- **missingData**: The downloaded app received a payload lacking enough data to perform an attribution check.
- **unsupportedPlatform**: The attribution API was called on an unsupported platform.
- **limitAdTracking**
- **unknown**
- **ADClientError.Code**: The error codes that pass from the attribution response to the completion handler.

## Error Characteristics

- **ADClientErrorDomain**: The error domain that passes to the completion handler.

## Type Properties

- **errorDomain**

## Attribution Errors

- **ADClientErrorDomain**: The error domain that passes to the completion handler.
- **ADClientError.Code**: The error codes that pass from the attribution response to the completion handler.

## Conforms To

- CustomNSError
- Equatable
- Error
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
